snapshot.description: Create the UI for listing samples, filtering, and triggering status updates/uploads.
snapshot.title: Build SampleManagementPage UI

changes.newValue:
1. Create SampleManagementPage with Bento Box aesthetics.
2. Implement Filter Bar for Status.
3. Build Sample Card with navigation buttons and status update actions.
4. Implement Bulk Upload Dialog using file_picker.
5. Use BlocBuilder to connect UI with SampleManagementCubit and AiAnalysisCubit.
